input.command: grep -rn "parse_file\s*(" --include="*" . | grep -v "^\s*//" | grep -v "fn parse_file" | grep -v "def parse_file" | grep -v "Binary file"

for f in ./src/index.rs ./src/parser/c_lang.rs ./src/parser/ruby.rs ./src/parser/cpp.rs ./src/parser/typescript.rs ./src/parser/java.rs ./src/parser/rust_lang.rs ./src/parser/javascript.rs ./src/parser/treesitter.rs ./src/parser/go.rs ./src/parser/python.rs ./src/parser/csharp.rs ./src/query/index.rs ./src/query/duckdb_backend.rs; do
  echo "=== $f ==="
  grep -n "parse_file" "$f"
done
